Messaging.messageHeading: Tell us what's on your mind

frontChat.welcomeMessage:
Hi there, chat here with survivors and allies from our Bloom team who are experienced in supporting one another. We’re here for you to share your questions, feelings and reflections as you work through our courses.

If you are at immediate risk of harm, please call emergency services if you can and if it’s safe for you to do so. While we don’t offer crisis support, we can help connect you to the kind of support service you need. You can look up support services in your area in our global directory here: c.chayn.co/directory.

You can chat with us in English, French, German, Hindi, Portuguese and Spanish.

We will always aim to respond to your message within 1-2 days.
frontChat.empty: Send your first message below and our team will get back to you soon.

status.error: Unable to connect. Please try again later.

errors.unsupportedImage: Only JPG, PNG, GIF or WebP images are supported.
errors.micPermission: Microphone access was denied. To record a voice note, allow microphone access in your browser settings and try again.
errors.micUnavailable: Could not access your microphone. Please check it is connected and try again.
